# Barker — The Stablecoin Yield Map

> Real-time stablecoin yield APY data from 500+ protocols and 20+ CEX.
> Free public API. No authentication required.

## What is Barker?

Barker is the leading stablecoin yield aggregation platform. It indexes real-time APY data across DeFi protocols and centralized exchanges, covering every stablecoin on the market across all chains.

Website: https://barker.money
API Base: https://api.barker.money/api/public/v1

## Public API Endpoints

1. GET /defi/vaults — DeFi yield pools (APY, TVL, protocol, chain, asset)
   Params: asset (usdc/usdt/dai/etc), chain (ethereum/bsc/arbitrum/etc), sort (apy/tvl), limit (1-100)

2. GET /market/overview — Market overview (total cap, yield-bearing cap, asset/chain distribution)
   No required params.

3. GET /market/trend — Historical APY trend (7-180 days) with US Treasury 3-month benchmark
   Params: days (7-180, default 90)

Rate limit: 30 requests/minute. No API key required.

APY fields are decimals (0.0523 = 5.23%) — multiply by 100 for display.
share_pct fields are already percentages (42.5 = 42.5%).

## Available AI Skills

- stablecoin-yield-radar: Query real-time stablecoin APY rankings
- stablecoin-market-brief: Get market overview, cap distribution, APY trends vs US Treasury
- stablecoin-risk-check: Assess stablecoin safety — depeg history, reserves, audit status
- yield-strategy-advisor: Get personalized yield allocation by risk tolerance and capital size
- stablecoin-depeg-monitor: Monitor peg stability, review historical depeg events
- stablecoin-yield-vs-tradfi: Compare DeFi yields vs bank savings, Treasury bills, money market funds
- stablecoin-chain-explorer: Explore stablecoin TVL and yields by blockchain

## Key Facts

- Covers 500+ DeFi protocols and 20+ centralized exchanges
- Stablecoins covered: All major stablecoins (USDT, USDC, DAI, USDS, USDe, sUSDe, FDUSD, GHO, crvUSD, PYUSD, sDAI, frxUSD, TUSD, LUSD, and more)
- Chains: All major chains (Ethereum, BSC, Arbitrum, Base, Polygon, Optimism, Avalanche, Solana, and more)
- Data updates in real-time
- Free public API, no authentication
- Enterprise API available for institutional clients

## Contact

Website: https://barker.money
GitHub: https://github.com/YBSbarker/barker-stablecoin-skills
Enterprise API: https://api.barker.money/pro
